_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2 ;Ink4a*/* (10 of 27 histologically examined mice; 37%) compared with adCre;Nf2 flox2/flox2 (9 of 72 histologically examined mice; 13%) mice (χ2, P < 0.01)
details: 37% meningioma development rate (10 of 27 histologically examined mice), significantly higher than Nf2 flox2/flox2 alone (P < 0.01)
